headline: Is It Time To Reassess Sherwin-Williams (SHW) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Sherwin-Williams at around US$317.70 still offers fair value or is starting to look stretched, the answer depends on how you look at its valuation and what assumptions you are comfortable with. The stock has seen a 5.3% decline over the last 7 days and a 12.9% decline over the last 30 days, while the 3 year return of 48.1% and 5 year return of 40.3% sit alongside a 3.1% decline year to date and a 6.3% decline over the last year. headline: The Sherwin-Williams Company to Hold Financial Community Presentation on September 24, 2026
summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) will hold its Financial Community Presentation in Cleveland, OH on September 24, 2026. Scheduled participants include Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer Heidi G. Petz, Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Benjamin E. Meisenzahl and additional senior leadership.
